allow: Bash(curl -s "https://api.ftcscout.org/graphql" -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""""query"""":""""{ __schema { queryType { fields { name description } } } }""""}')

Bash(curl -s "https://api.ftcscout.org/graphql" -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""""query"""":""""{ tepRecords\(season: 2024, limit: 2, sortBy: \\""""tot\\"""", sortDir: Desc\) { data { teamNumber team { name } stats { tot { value rank } } } } }""""}')
